prompt: Use case: stylized-concept; Asset type: store capsule key art for Orbwalker, fantasy match-3 roguelike; Primary request: wide production candidate key art showing a lone orbwalker hero manipulating elemental orbs in a dungeon, with a looming enemy silhouette and treasure chest support elements. Subject: hooded fantasy hero seen in dynamic three-quarter pose, one hand channeling elemental orb magic, enemy threat in distance. Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game key art, premium indie fantasy, clean shapes, mobile/store readable. Composition/framing: 16:9 wide banner with safe negative space near top-left and top-right for later logo/crops; no text. Lighting/mood: dramatic warm treasure light balanced with cool dungeon blue shadows. Color palette: varied elemental colors, gold accents, dark stone, not monochrome. Constraints: no readable text, no logo, no watermark, no copyrighted characters, no casino imagery, no gore, no UI overlay, no fake screenshot frame.
